description_long: This object is a retro-style portable radio receiver with a rectangular body featuring a combination of orange and blue panels. The front face displays a large circular speaker grille on the right, a rectangular blue-tinted window likely for a tuning scale or display, and two prominent silver dials on the top for volume and tuning control. A black and gray handle arches over the top, allowing for easy carrying. The back panel is blue with multiple ventilation slits and a rectangular access panel, suggesting battery or component access. The sides show the thickness of the device and the attachment points for the handle, with one side featuring a large black knob, possibly for tuning or power.
description: A retro portable radio receiver with an orange and blue body, large speaker grille, silver dials, and a carrying handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, blue display window, and two silver dials on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness, handle attachment, and a large black knob.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying blue panel with ventilation slits and a rectangular access panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the handle attachment and the orange and blue color split.
